listitem.para: How long a particular instance of a connection (a set of encryption/authentication keys for user packets) should last up to a maximum of 24 hours (1d or 24h); from successful negotiation to expiry.
Normally, the connection is renegotiated (via the keying channel) before it expires. The two ends need not exactly agree on salifetime.
History: the original parameter was called all of keylife=, lifetime, and salifetime=; these were replaced by ipsec-lifetime= in &Libreswan; 4.8.
